dict.string: MLX Core uses AppleScript to control Safari and other apps in agent mode.
Copyright 2026 David Dalcu. All rights reserved.
MLX Core records audio from your microphone so multimodal models (like Gemma 4 12B) can listen to and respond to your voice.

MLX Core uses Apple's on-device speech recognition in Voice mode so you can talk to the model hands-free, even with no internet. Your audio is transcribed locally on your Mac; this app forces on-device recognition and never sends your speech to Apple's servers. (The wording above is Apple's standard text for this permission.)
